  [Submitted on 10 Oct 2023 ( v1 ), last revised 25 May 2024 (this version, v3)] 
     Title: Jailbreak and Guard Aligned Language Models with Only Few In-Context Demonstrations 
     Authors: Zeming Wei ,  Yifei Wang ,  Ang Li ,  Yichuan Mo ,  Yisen Wang              View a PDF of the paper titled Jailbreak and Guard Aligned Language Models with Only Few In-Context Demonstrations, by Zeming Wei and 4 other authors 
     View PDF 
     HTML (experimental) 



     
             Abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) have shown remarkable success in various tasks, yet their safety and the risk of generating harmful content remain pressing concerns. In this paper, we delve into the potential of In-Context Learning (ICL) to modulate the alignment of LLMs. Specifically, we propos
